name: Chainscope Atlas
description: Single-profile MCP and A2A agent for wallet intelligence and onchain monitoring.
author: dataweb

skills.name: onchain_alpha
skills.description: Prompt template for onchain opportunity research.

skills.name: wallet_monitor
skills.description: Prompt template for monitoring a strategic wallet set.

skills.name: token_brief
skills.description: Generate concise token briefs for active assets.

skills.name: wallet_risk
skills.description: Screen wallet behavior for concentration and risk clues.

skills.name: chain_summary
skills.description: Summarize chain activity, throughput, and fee context.

skills.name: signal_feed
skills.description: Produce fast watchlist updates around a chosen theme.

skills.name: liquidity_watch
skills.description: Track liquidity changes across venues and token pairs.

skills.name: bridge_flow
skills.description: Analyze bridge flows and cross-chain capital movement.

skills.name: smart_money_trace
skills.description: Follow notable wallets and infer positioning changes.

skills.name: contract_watch
skills.description: Monitor contract interactions and behavior anomalies.

skills.name: launch_monitor
skills.description: Watch new launches, mint events, and early market traction.

skills.name: holder_distribution
skills.description: Assess holder concentration and ownership structure.

skills.name: dex_activity_scan
skills.description: Read DEX activity for flow, volatility, and momentum clues.

skills.name: risk_alerts
skills.description: Highlight onchain conditions that raise immediate risk.

skills.name: thesis_validation
skills.description: Validate or challenge an onchain thesis with supporting signals.
